allGaps.description: ChatGPT categorises GitHub as a "project management tool" while Claude describes it as a "design collaboration platform." The two positions imply different competitor sets and different buyers.
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning section with explicit category and "not this" statements.

evidence.chatgptSays: GitHub is a project management tool for engineering teams.
evidence.claudeSays: GitHub is a design collaboration and prototyping platform.
evidence.siteContent: GitHub — the single source of truth for your product team.

allGaps.description: ChatGPT says GitHub is self-hosted, Claude says it's cloud-only. The site says both are available.

evidence.chatgptSays: GitHub runs entirely on your own infrastructure, self-hosted.
evidence.claudeSays: GitHub is a cloud-only SaaS with no self-hosting option.
evidence.siteContent: Deploy in the cloud or self-host. Your call.

allGaps.description: Neither model names GitHub's actual differentiator — the audit layer that catches AI hallucinations before they ship. Both models describe it as "another dev tool."
allGaps.whatFileNeeds: Positioning: explicit comparisons vs 2–3 well-known alternatives.

evidence.chatgptSays: GitHub is one of many dev tools in the space, similar to its peers.
evidence.claudeSays: GitHub offers a standard set of developer-productivity features.
evidence.siteContent: GitHub is the only tool that checks AI outputs against your design decisions.

product.name: GitHub
product.description: GitHub — the single source of truth for how AI models should describe this product.
product.audience: founders who already have users and want to keep them

headline.description: ChatGPT categorises GitHub as a "project management tool" while Claude describes it as a "design collaboration platform." The two positions imply different competitor sets and different buyers.
headline.chatgptSays: GitHub is a project management tool for engineering teams.
headline.claudeSays: GitHub is a design collaboration and prototyping platform.
headline.siteContent: GitHub — the single source of truth for your product team.
